money_flow_summary: Advertisers pay platforms and publishers CPM/CPC to reach audiences. AI has collapsed the cost of creative production and campaign management — solo operators can now run $1M+ ad budgets with automation.

opportunities.title: AI Creative Studio for Meta/TikTok Ads
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Ingests brand product catalog + past ads, generates 50+ ad creative variants/week, auto-uploads to Meta/TikTok via API, monitors performance, kills underperformers. Charge $500–$2,000/mo to DTC brands.
opportunities.moat: Performance data creates flywheel — more brands = better creative templates
opportunities.first_step: Connect Meta Marketing API + fal.ai for image gen; build 'generate 20 ad variants from product URL' demo
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI generates, tests, and iterates ad creative 10x faster than human designers

competitors.name: AdCreative.ai
competitors.weakness: Generic templates; no auto-upload to ad platforms; no performance-based iteration; $21–$149/mo — too cheap to be useful

competitors.name: Smartly.io
competitors.weakness: Enterprise only ($2k+/mo); no AI creative generation, just scheduling/automation

competitors.name: Motion (app)
competitors.weakness: Analytics only, not generation; requires human creatives; $500–$1,000/mo

opportunities.gap: AdCreative.ai generates images but can't auto-upload to ad platforms or kill poor performers. The closed-loop system (generate → test → kill → iterate) doesn't exist affordably.
poc_steps: Pick 1 DTC brand (can be yours or a friend's Shopify store)
Use fal.ai/Replicate to generate 10 product image variants (product photos with different backgrounds/copy)
Manually upload to Meta Ads Manager, set $5/day test budget
Show client which variants won after 3 days

opportunities.title: Google Ads Automation for Local Businesses (White-Label)
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Auto-creates Google Ads campaigns from a business's Google Business Profile, generates keywords with LLM, writes ad copy, optimizes bids. Sell white-label to local marketing agencies at $99/seat.
opportunities.moat: White-label distribution through agencies creates 1:N leverage
opportunities.first_step: Build Google Ads API sandbox integration; create white-label agency demo
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI writes hyper-local ad copy and adjusts bids based on local competitor activity automatically

competitors.name: WordStream
competitors.weakness: Not truly automated; still requires human management; $264–$528/mo; no AI copywriting

competitors.name: LocaliQ (Gannett)
competitors.weakness: Traditional agency model with some automation; expensive; slow to set up

competitors.name: Vendasta
competitors.weakness: Broad platform (not specialized); complex; expensive for small agencies

opportunities.gap: Local marketing agencies have 50–200 clients each but no affordable tool that actually auto-generates and auto-optimizes campaigns end-to-end. They need a robot they can resell.
poc_steps: Register for Google Ads API access (1–2 days for approval)
Build script that creates 1 campaign from a business name + zip code
Add Claude to write the 3 headlines + 2 descriptions
Demo live to 1 local marketing agency owner

opportunities.title: Ad Attribution & ROAS Clarity Tool
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Combines Shopify data, Meta CAPI events, GA4, and post-purchase surveys into a unified ROAS model. Uses statistical modeling to infer attribution where tracking breaks down. Sell to $500k–$10M/yr ecommerce brands at $199–$799/mo.
opportunities.moat: Historical attribution data creates switching cost; accuracy compounds
opportunities.first_step: Build Shopify + Meta CAPI + GA4 connector; create demo dashboard with fake data
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI infers probabilistic attribution where deterministic tracking fails — solving a $50B/yr problem

competitors.name: Northbeam
competitors.weakness: $1,000+/mo minimum; only for $1M+ ad spend brands; complex setup; overkill for SMBs

competitors.name: Triple Whale
competitors.weakness: Shopify-centric; $129–$649/mo; basic MTA; UI is overwhelming for small teams

competitors.name: Rockerbox
competitors.weakness: Enterprise ($2k+/mo); not accessible for sub-$5M brands

opportunities.gap: Post-iOS14, every DTC brand has broken attribution. Existing tools either cost $1k+/mo (too expensive for small brands) or give oversimplified last-click data. The $100k–$1M ad spend brand is underserved.
poc_steps: Build Shopify → Google Sheets integration pulling order + UTM data
Add post-purchase survey with 1 question ('How did you hear about us?')
Build simple dashboard showing survey vs reported channel breakdown
Charge $199/mo after showing 1 brand their attribution discrepancy
